recommendations.title: Sunset Song
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a Scottish farmer comes of age in the early 1900s.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Passion
recommendations.overview: The story of American poet Emily Dickinson from her early days as a young schoolgirl to her later years as a reclusive, unrecognized artist.

recommendations.title: The Deep Blue Sea
recommendations.overview: The wife of a British Judge is caught in a self-destructive love affair with a Royal Air Force pilot.

recommendations.title: Distant Voices, Still Lives
recommendations.overview: Siblings Maisie and Tony, along with their mother, gather for their sister Eileen's wedding. It is a joyous occasion, but through flashbacks, it becomes clear that the family was not always happy. Their father was physically abusive to his wife and l

recommendations.title: The Apartment
recommendations.overview: Bud Baxter is a minor clerk in a huge New York insurance company, until he discovers a quick way to climb the corporate ladder. He lends out his apartment to the executives as a place to take their mistresses. Although he often has to deal with the a

recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: Kingdom of the Spiders
recommendations.overview: Investigating the mysterious deaths of a number of farm animals, vet Rack Hansen discovers that his town lies in the path of hordes of migrating tarantulas. Before he can take action, the streets are overrun by killer spiders, trapping a small group

recommendations.title: Come Play
recommendations.overview: Oliver, a lonely autistic boy, seeks solace and refuge in his ever-present cell phone and tablet. When a mysterious creature uses the boy's devices against him, his parents must fight to save their son from the monster beyond the screen.

recommendations.title: Urban Cowboy
recommendations.overview: After moving to Pasadena, Texas, country boy Bud Davis starts hanging around a bar called Gilley's, where he falls in love with Sissy, a cowgirl who believes the sexes are equal. They eventually marry, but their relationship is turbulent due to Bud's

recommendations.title: My Name Is Francesco Totti
recommendations.overview: Francesco Totti retraces his entire life while watching it on the silver screen together with the audience. Images and emotions flow among key moments of his career, scenes from his personal life and memories he has never shared before.
